description: Checked-in deterministic reference evidence for current-run required-gate evaluator coverage.

checks.rationale: The effect_present gate is part of the required policy set and is registry-backed in the release-grade reference lane.
The current-run required-gate producer records this gate as explicit evidence and binds it through required_gate_evidence_v0.json before status materialization.
Communication-control reference evidence is present and bound to this gate.
The communication-control reducer emits pass=true for the checked-in reference evidence.
The reference action set is ordered by protective strength.
The protected-state score does not decrease across the ordered action set.
The commutativity property passes on the baseline reference slice.
The commutativity property passes under the checked-in reference shift variant.
The reference evidence records the A→B protected-state transition result.
The B→A transition result matches the A→B transition result in the checked-in reference evidence.
The reference evidence records the result of a single PSF application.
Repeated application matches the single-application result for the checked-in reference case.
The monotonicity property remains true on the baseline reference slice.
The monotonicity property remains true under the checked-in reference shift variant.
The reference PSF monotonicity evidence records that increasing protective controls does not decrease the protected-state score.
The checked-in monotonicity evidence contains no counterexample for the canonical reference transitions.
The reference evidence records the direct transition path.
The composed path reaches the same reference protected state as the direct path.
The reference PII exposure levels are ordered from less to more sensitive.
Protection does not decrease as the reference PII exposure level increases.
The Q2 consistency reference evidence includes deterministic agreement groups.
The checked-in Q2 agreement summary meets the reference consistency threshold.
The Q3 fairness reference evidence includes deterministic slice coverage.
The checked-in Q3 slice summary meets the reference fairness threshold.
The sanitization property passes on the baseline reference slice.
The sanitization property passes under the checked-in reference shift variant.
